description: Showcase UBO structure: sanctioned individual hidden 3 layers deep through offshore shell companies. This is the headline demo scenario from the playbook.

entities.name: Meridian Holdings International
entities.context: Offshore holding company registered in Cayman Islands

entities.name: Aegean Ventures Cyprus Ltd
entities.context: Shell company registered in Cyprus with minimal operations

entities.name: Mohammad Al-Rashid
entities.context: Director with corporate ownership links in UAE region

ownership_edges.description: Clean Corp owns 80% of Meridian Holdings
Meridian Holdings owns 60% of Aegean Ventures
Aegean Ventures wholly controlled by Mohammad Al-Rashid (sanctioned)
